Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 
157 
SR_HAS_CORE_HRSN_IND 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary Has at Least 1 Core HRSN 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Beneficiary has at least one core health related social need (HRSN). 
LONG NAME: SR_HAS_CORE_HRSN_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = No core HRSNs 
1 = One or more core HRSNs 
COMMENT: 
Variables that start with “SR” include
